text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day has finally arrived for the Hopeful
Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What's today's race again? The Heartful Gretel? I
heard it's the first race ever held underwater.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Finally, the day I can show the world my
stunning butterfly stroke has come!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Just you wait, Pacific Ocean! I'll see you as soon
as I get past the Japan Trench!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's definitely excited for the wrong thing, but
at least she's excited to race in general!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Will do! Nothing can stop me, much less a measly
oceanic trench or two!
